---
name: New module proposal
about: Propose an entirely new module for the platform
title: "[MODULE PROPOSAL] "
labels: module-proposal
---

**Module name**

**Purpose**
What educational/operational capability does this module provide?

**Tenant types it applies to**
(School / Tutoring Centre / College / Training Academy / All)

**Core dependencies**
Which Core services will it use (Auth, RBAC, Notifications, AI Gateway, Storage, Billing...)?

**Other module dependencies**
Does it need to interact with other modules? How (events, published interfaces)?

**Data model sketch**
High-level entities this module will own.

**API surface sketch**
High-level endpoints this module will expose.

**Roadmap placement**
Proposed version (1.0 / 1.5 / 2.0 / later) — see `docs/roadmap.md`.
